public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as relief coordinator.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Zootia, that reads as someone practical, supply-aware, and season-conscious, attentive to material reliability over display, and the habits of a relief coordinator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of relief coordinator in and around House Zootia, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Zootia workable through the obligations of relief coordinator while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Zootia.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around House Zootia, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of relief coordinator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Brenn Fieldmere can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Brenn Fieldmere can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Brenn Fieldmere carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Zootia: the part of House Zootia where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
